body.para: Per-model reference material. The DS10 is the only platform EmulatR currently models and drives end to end, so it carries a full appendix with detailed sub-topics; the larger Tsunami-family machines (DS20, ES40, ES45) are scaffolded but not yet validated and are documented here as planned work.
Appendix - DS10 -- the modeled platform: CPU, chipset, device manifest, and detail sub-topics.
Env Vars Operation Ref / Kill the EmulatR / Known Limitations -- DS10 operational reference.
SRM Boot / SRM Commands Prompt / SuperIO Controller -- DS10 firmware and SuperIO analysis.
Task Matrix / TimeOut Loops -- engineering status and the bounded firmware wait loops.
Appendix DS20 / ES40 / ES45 -- planned platforms (not yet validated).
